message:
Fix starlight-llms-txt config options for per-page markdown

The plugin API changed - options were renamed:
- generatePageMarkdown → perPageMarkdown
- markdownFilePattern → extensionStrategy (nested inside perPageMarkdown)

This was causing 404s for .md URLs like /integrations/google/cloud-logging.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -112,8 +112,9 @@ export default defineConfig({
                 projectName: "Tenzir",
                 description:
                   "The low-code data pipeline solution for security teams",
-                generatePageMarkdown: true,
-                markdownFilePattern: "replace",
+                perPageMarkdown: {
+                  extensionStrategy: "replace",
+                },
                 customSets: [
                   {
                     label: "Reference",
